name: MPK Compact
shortDescription: For small-to-medium parts, this compact curing oven offers precise temperature control and programmable profiles.
description: The Compact Composite Curing Oven is designed for small to medium composite parts, test panels, UAV components and precision production work.
highlights: Powerful heating system for fast thermal response

name: MPK Workshop
shortDescription: More working volume than the Compact, with a practical footprint for everyday composite workshop use.
description: The Workshop Composite Curing Oven is designed for composite manufacturers that need more working volume than the Compact model, while keeping a practical footprint for daily workshop use.
highlights: Powerful heating system for fast thermal response

name: MPK Production
shortDescription: A production-focused curing oven for small-series manufacturing and larger technical components needing stable, repeatable cures.
description: The Production Composite Curing Oven is designed for regular composite manufacturing, small-series production and larger technical components requiring stable and repeatable curing conditions.
highlights: Powerful heating system for fast thermal response

name: MPK Large Format
shortDescription: Built for oversized and demanding production workflows.
description: The Large Format Composite Curing Oven is built for oversized molds, body panels, structural composite parts and demanding production workflows.
highlights: Powerful heating system for fast thermal response

name: MPK Custom
shortDescription: A curing oven engineered around your exact part size, process, loading method and production workflow.
description:
The Custom Composite Curing Oven is engineered around the client’s specific part size, curing process, loading method and production workflow.
 From extended chambers and custom vacuum layouts to higher temperature ranges, airflow configuration and advanced control options, each oven is built to match the exact requirements of the manufacturing process.
highlights: Engineered around your part size, process & loading method
Powerful heating system for fast thermal response

name: MPK CS
shortDescription: Industrial touchscreen control for composite curing — build, run and monitor multi-stage temperature profiles in real time.
description: The MPK CS control unit features an industrial touchscreen interface designed for intuitive operation of composite curing cycles. Operators can create, edit and run multi-stage temperature profiles with programmable ramp, soak and cooling phases, while monitoring the full process in real time.The system visualizes both the programmed and actual temperature curves, displays cycle status, elapsed and remaining time, and uses PID control for accurate thermal regulation. Built-in software validation and process monitoring help ensure safe, repeatable and controlled curing performance for production use.
highlights: Create, edit & run multi-stage temperature profiles
Real-time programmed vs. actual temperature curves
Cycle status with elapsed & remaining time
PID control for accurate thermal regulation

name: MPK CS + TU
shortDescription: Turn your own insulated chamber into a fully controlled composite curing oven with integrated heating, airflow and PID control.
description: The MPK CS Thermal Unit is designed for manufacturers who already have, or plan to build, their own insulated oven chamber according to predefined working dimensions. It integrates touchscreen control, heating power, air circulation, PID temperature regulation, programmable curing profiles and process monitoring to turn a custom-built chamber into a functional composite curing oven.
highlights: Turns a custom-built chamber into a functional curing oven
For your own insulated chamber at predefined dimensions
